title: Galician Wrap
description: A simple and flavorful wrap filled with Galician sausage, delicate ingredients, and a hint of daring spices.
instructions: Preheat your grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the wrap with olive oil and grill for 1-2 minutes, until lightly charred.
In a pan, cook the Galician sausage over medium heat until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the crumbled tofu and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the delicate greens and cook until wilted, about 1-2 minutes.
Sprinkle with dried oregano and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to the grilled wrap and drizzle with vinegar, if using.
